creator: question+fbsdports@closedsrc.org
text:
On 2006-07-26 23:10 +0000, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

# Maintainer of security/base,
# 
# Please note that PR ports/100895 has just been submitted.
# 
# If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
# you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
# and a committer will take care of it.
# 
# The full text of the PR can be found at:
#     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/100895

I approve the updated patch. Can this be rolled into ports/100783 upon
commit? Thanks.

-- 
Linh Pham
question+fbsdports@closedsrc.org
http://closedsrc.org/
